basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026: Apply for Project Technical Support - I Post
basic_details.short_information: The Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER), Puducherry has released an official advertisement for Project Technical Support - I positions.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be notified 1 week in advance

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Up to 28 years old on the final date of application receipt. | Field Requirement: Candidates must be willing to travel to urban and rural health facilities across Puducherry districts for data collection.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by the Principal Investigator: | Core Education: Class 10 pass along with a Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician (EMT) or Medical Laboratory Technician (MLT). Work Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience in the relevant field or subject. Languages: Good command over reading, writing, and speaking Tamil and English.

salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must complete an offline registration process via email:
Download the prescribed application format attached to official advertisement Advt. No. JIP/EM&T/F-MA/ICMR-INDIA EMS Project/2026/N03C.
Fill out the application form completely and attach a copy of your updated CV alongside relevant educational or experience certificates.
Scan all papers into a single, combined PDF file.
Name the PDF precisely using this layout: Candidate name_Post-name_year_application (e.g., James_PTS-1_2026_application).
Send the email with your target post name in the subject line to [email protected].

faq.question: Q1. What is the JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026 is a walk-in/selection-based hiring for temporary technical staff under an ICMR-funded research project in the Department of Emergency Medicine & Trauma at JIPMER, Puducherry. The engagement is purely contractual and linked to the ICMR-INDIA EMS Project, with no claim for permanent JIPMER employment.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form and supporting documents by email is June 9, 2026, up to 4:30 PM. Applications received after the cut-off time will not be considered for shortlisting.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The exact number of Project Technical Support – I vacancies has not been specified and is project-driven, depending on the requirement of the ICMR-INDIA EMS Project. Candidates should refer to the official advertisement for any subsequent updates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I in 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Project Technical Support – I post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of ₹21,600, which includes 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA). No additional allowances or permanent benefits are applicable.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I?
faq.answer: Applicants must have passed Class 10 and possess a Diploma in Emergency Medical Technician (EMT) or Medical Laboratory Technician (MLT) from a recognized institution. In addition, candidates must have at least 2 years of relevant work experience in the concerned field or subject.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 28 years as on the last date of application receipt (June 9, 2026). Candidates exceeding the age limit will not be eligible to apply, subject to any relaxations mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job role and field requirement for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I?
faq.answer: Project Technical Support – I staff will support the ICMR-INDIA EMS Project by assisting in data collection, coordination and field activities under the Department of Emergency Medicine & Trauma. Candidates must be willing to travel to urban and rural health facilities across Puducherry districts for field data collection work.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for JIPMER Project Technical Support – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process consists of initial shortlisting based on the application form, CV and submitted certificates, followed by a written test and personal interview for shortlisted candidates. The written test and interview will be held at the Department of Emergency Medicine & Trauma, JIPMER, Puducherry.
